sqlMap.select: select * from RatingTrace where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into RatingTrace(TransactionSequence, PolicyKey XmlInputDatatoRating XmlOutputDatafromRating RatingDate LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp CreatedDate CreatedBy ) values (#TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #XmlInputDatatoRating# #XmlOutputDatafromRating# #RatingDate# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #CreatedDate# #CreatedBy# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('RatingTrace') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select RatingTraceSequence, XmlInputDatatoRating, XmlOutputDatafromRating, RatingDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey from RatingTrace where RatingTraceSequence = #RatingTraceSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update RatingTrace set
XmlInputDatatoRating = #XmlInputDatatoRating# XmlInputDatatoRating = null XmlOutputDatafromRating = #XmlOutputDatafromRating# XmlOutputDatafromRating = null RatingDate = #RatingDate# RatingDate = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null
where RatingTraceSequence = #RatingTraceSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from RatingTrace where RatingTraceSequence = #RatingTraceSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from RatingTrace where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select RatingTraceSequence, XmlInputDatatoRating, XmlOutputDatafromRating, RatingDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey from RatingTrace where RatingTraceSequence = #RatingTraceSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select RatingTraceSequence, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, XmlInputDatatoRating, XmlOutputDatafromRating, RatingDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CreatedDate, CreatedBy from RatingTrace where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
